photos.title: Morning Mist Valley
photos.description: Early morning fog lingering between the mountains.
photos.note: Set out at 3am, crossed two mountains to reach this spot. Waited two hours for the mist to rise.

photos.title: Raindrop on Leaf
photos.description: A single water droplet suspended on a leaf tip, refracting the world.
photos.note: The macro world never ceases to amaze.

photos.title: Dreamcatcher
photos.description: Sunlight threading through a dreamcatcher, weaving a golden dream.
photos.note: Found this in a small shop in the ancient town. The owner said she made it by hand.

photos.title: Cable Car Traveler
photos.description: Looking down from above, all worries become small.
photos.note: Minus fifteen degrees, fingers nearly too frozen to press the shutter.

photos.title: Neon Alley
photos.description: Neon lights painting the rain-soaked streets of Shinjuku.
photos.note: Every visit to Tokyo, this alley feels different.

photos.title: Typewriter Memories
photos.description: A vintage typewriter in a cafe corner, carrying stories from last century.
photos.note: In the digital age, the beauty of mechanical things becomes even more precious.

photos.title: Victoria Harbour Night
photos.description: Ten thousand lights from The Peak overlooking Victoria Harbour.
photos.note: National Day evening, the whole harbor celebrating.

photos.title: Empty Theater
photos.description: An empty theater after the show, lights not yet fully dimmed.
photos.note: Stayed five extra minutes after everyone left. This moment was mine alone.

photos.title: Dandelion Journey
photos.description: A dandelion swaying gently in hand, waiting for the wind.
photos.note: My daughter handed it to me and said 'Daddy, quick, take a photo!'

photos.title: Ridge Sunset
photos.description: The last ray of light sweeping across the mountain ridge.
photos.note: Waited three days for this weather. It rained every day on the mountain until the third day finally cleared.

photos.title: Lightning & City
photos.description: The last bolt of lightning before the storm, splitting the entire skyline.
photos.note: Shooting in storms is dangerous, but some scenes only exist in these moments. Stay safe.

photos.title: Ferry at Dusk
photos.description: The last ferry heading to the other shore, sunset gilding the river.
photos.note: Medium format color transitions are unmatched, especially with gradient skies like this.
